Package umm.digiquilt.view.filebrowser

Class Summary
MissingIcon A dynamicallly created icon, which shows a red X in a black border.
NotePanel The panel on the bottom of the save and load boxes.
PatchAccessory A side panel for a JFileChooser that displays a preview of the selected patch and the notes/challenge for that quilt.
PatchFileChooser  
PatchFileFilter  
PatchFileView  
QuiltAccessory A side panel for a JFileChooser that displays a preview of the selected quilt and the notes/challenge for that quilt.
QuiltFileChooser File chooser that is customized for DigiQuilt.
QuiltFileFilter  
QuiltFileView This class is responsible for getting icons for quilt files.
QuiltFSView QuiltFSView is a custom FileSystemView, which restricts what is visible to the user.
SaveBrowser The save dialog box.
